mapper.select: SELECT STAGE_NO FROM STAGE_SAVE WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo}
SELECT REVIEW_NO, MEMBER_NO, STAGE_NO, REVIEW_CONTENT, REVIEW_WRITE_DATE FROM REVIEWS WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND REVIEW_DEL_FL = 'N'

SELECT u.UNVEILING_NO, u.UNVEILING_TITLE, u.PRODUCTION_ARTIST, img.UV_IMG_PATH AS THUMB_URL, b.MY_MAX_BID_PRICE, b.BID_DATE, u.UNVEILING_STATUS, u.FINALIZED_FL, u.MEMBER_NO, u.FINAL_PRICE, u.PAYMENT_STATUS FROM UNVEILING u JOIN ( SELECT UNVEILING_NO, MAX(BID_PRICE) AS MY_MAX_BID_PRICE, MAX(BID_DATE) KEEP (DENSE_RANK LAST ORDER BY BID_PRICE) AS BID_DATE FROM BIDDING WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} GROUP BY UNVEILING_NO ) b ON u.UNVEILING_NO = b.UNVEILING_NO LEFT JOIN UNVEILING_IMG img ON img.UNVEILING_NO = u.UNVEILING_NO AND img.UV_IMG_ORDER = 1 ORDER BY b.BID_DATE DESC
SELECT STAGE_NO FROM STAGE_PREFER WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND PREFER_TYPE = 'LIKE'
